titles.title: God's Not Dead, He Is Alive

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God’s not dead, He is Alive God’s not dead, He is Alive God’s not dead, He is Alive I can feel Him all over me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I can feel Him in my hands I can feel Him in my feet I can feel Him everywhere I can feel Him all over me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I can feel Him in the air I can feel Him in the Church I can feel Him on the street I can feel Him all over me
